javascript:(function(){if(!document.getElementById('workskin'))return;const STYLE_ID='ao3-focus-style';const OWN=new Set([STYLE_ID,'ao3-focus-progress']);const CSS=`*{font-family:"Cambria",serif !important;}body{background:#e8e5dc !important;margin:0 !important;}#main{background:transparent !important;padding:40px 0 80px !important;}#workskin{background-color:#f4f1e8 !important;color:#1f1f1c !important;font-size:21px !important;max-width:760px !important;margin:0 auto !important;padding:2% 4% !important;border:1px solid #dddddd !important;box-shadow:0 4px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.06) !important;}#workskin p{line-height:1.6 !important;}#ao3-focus-progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:3px;width:0%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#b5a080,#7c6a50);z-index:9999;transition:width 0.1s linear;}`;let hidden=[];function mk(tag,id){const el=document.createElement(tag);el.id=id;return el;}function walk(node,skin){[...node.children].forEach(child=>{if(OWN.has(child.id)||child===skin)return;if(child.contains(skin)){walk(child,skin);return;}hidden.push(child);child.style.setProperty('display','none','important');});}function hide(skin){hidden=[];walk(document.body,skin);}function restore(){hidden.forEach(el=>el.style.removeProperty('display'));hidden=[];}function withAnchor(fn){const skin=document.getElementById('workskin');const ps=skin?skin.querySelectorAll('p'):[];let el=ps.length?ps[ps.length-1]:skin;for(const p of ps){if(p.getBoundingClientRect().bottom>0){el=p;break;}}const y0=el?el.getBoundingClientRect().top:0;fn();if(el?.isConnected){const dy=el.getBoundingClientRect().top-y0;if(dy)window.scrollTo({top:window.scrollY+dy,behavior:'instant'});}}function onScroll(){const bar=document.getElementById('ao3-focus-progress');if(!bar)return;const total=document.body.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight;bar.style.width=total>0?(window.scrollY/total*100)+'%':'0%';}function onFsChange(){if(!document.fullscreenElement)disable();}function enable(){if(document.getElementById(STYLE_ID))return;document.documentElement.requestFullscreen?.().catch(()=>{});withAnchor(()=>{const style=mk('style',STYLE_ID);style.textContent=CSS;document.head.appendChild(style);document.body.appendChild(mk('div','ao3-focus-progress'));const skin=document.getElementById('workskin');if(skin)hide(skin);});window.addEventListener('scroll',onScroll,{passive:true});document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange',onFsChange);}function disable(){withAnchor(()=>{OWN.forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.remove());restore();});window.removeEventListener('scroll',onScroll);document.removeEventListener('fullscreenchange',onFsChange);if(document.fullscreenElement)document.exitFullscreen?.().catch(()=>{});}document.getElementById(STYLE_ID)?disable():enable();window.ao3Focus={enable,disable};})();
